name: Lysosomal Restoration Trial-Horizon Surveillance

scope.question: Do current ASPro-PD and ambroxol Parkinson registry or same-window publication checks change the Lysosomal Restoration outlook or clear stale local trial-watch metadata?

summary: Ran a focused Lysosomal Restoration surveillance pass to reconcile the ASPro-PD no-results watch record and two older ambroxol Parkinson registry-linked studies. ClinicalTrials.gov still lists ASPro-PD NCT05778617 as recruiting with no posted results, last update posted May 1, 2025, estimated primary completion in February 2029, and estimated study completion in September 2029. NCT02941822 remains completed with no registry results section while the peer-reviewed open-label result remains recorded locally. NCT02914366 still has unknown registry status and no registry results section while the peer-reviewed randomized Parkinson disease dementia result remains recorded locally. Broad registry and PubMed searches found no new ASPro-PD outcome publication, posted registry result, safety signal, correction, or material lysosomal-restoration update since the June 7 pass. No outlook, stage, momentum, confidence, source, finding, activity, bundle, or coverage assessment update is warranted.

materiality_decision.rationale: The stale ASPro-PD item was a local registry-check metadata gap, not a field delta. Current registry checks show no posted results and no evidence that would alter the tentative human_biomarker_signal Lysosomal Restoration read. The public study metadata was refreshed only to record the June 14 registry check, structured completion timing, and the recruiting registry status.

search_log.summary: Scoped report contained 3 registry-linked Lysosomal Restoration studies, 0 missing trial-detail records, 3 stale or missing registry checks, and 1 open stale watch item. The open stale item was ASPro-PD NCT05778617; the other stale records were already result-bearing ambroxol studies with registry IDs but no persisted local registry-check dates.

search_log.query: Direct checks for NCT05778617, NCT02941822, and NCT02914366
search_log.summary: NCT05778617 remains RECRUITING with hasResults=false, 330 estimated enrollment, February 2029 estimated primary completion, September 2029 estimated study completion, and last update posted May 1, 2025. NCT02941822 remains COMPLETED with hasResults=false, April 2018 actual primary completion, May 2018 actual study completion, and last update posted April 15, 2020. NCT02914366 remains UNKNOWN with hasResults=false, 55 actual enrollment, estimated December 2025 primary and study completion, and last update posted February 28, 2024.

search_log.query: ASPro-PD ambroxol Parkinson; NCT05778617; ambroxol Parkinson GBA GCase; lysosomal restoration aging ambroxol; trehalose TFEB lysosomal aging
search_log.summary: The ASPro-PD-specific queries returned NCT05778617 only. The broader ambroxol Parkinson/GBA query returned already-known no-results disease-program records including NCT02914366, NCT04588285, NCT05830396, NCT05287503, and NCT02941822. Lysosomal restoration aging ambroxol and trehalose/TFEB lysosomal aging registry queries returned no new material trial.

search_log.query: (ASPro-PD OR NCT05778617 OR ambroxol OR GCase OR glucocerebrosidase) AND (Parkinson OR GBA OR lysosomal) AND 2026/06/07:2026/06/14[edat]
search_log.summary: Returned PMIDs 42280768, 42278317, 42259784, and 42252285. These were allosteric GCase stabilizer computational/phytochemical context, neuronopathic Gaucher review context, dopaminergic-neuron glucocerebrosidase/ferroptosis mechanism, and GBA1/KAT8/alpha-synuclein mechanism context; none was a new ASPro-PD result or ambroxol clinical outcome.

search_log.query: (lysosomal OR lysosome OR TFEB OR trehalose OR LAMP2A OR chaperone-mediated autophagy) AND (aging OR healthspan OR lifespan OR Parkinson) AND 2026/06/07:2026/06/14[edat]
search_log.summary: Returned 19 records. Close records were preclinical mechanism, genetic-burden, review, biomarker-method, or adjacent neurodegeneration context rather than human lysosomal-restoration outcome evidence. No correction, retraction, or result-bearing update to the public ambroxol support set was found.
Returned one record, the already-recorded ASPro-PD protocol PMID 41708985. No linked ASPro-PD outcome publication was found.

search_log.query: ASPro-PD ambroxol Parkinson results 2026; ASPro-PD NCT05778617 results ambroxol Parkinson June 2026
search_log.summary: ClinicalTrials.gov, UCL, Cure Parkinson's, and Parkinson's UK pages continue to describe ASPro-PD as an underway phase 3 trial rather than a result-bearing source. No current web or sponsor page reported ASPro-PD outcome results.

trial_watch_checks.summary: ASPro-PD remains recruiting with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. Local metadata was refreshed with the June 14 registry check, the May 1, 2025 registry update date, and structured estimated completion months.

The open-label ambroxol registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section and no update since April 15, 2020. The peer-reviewed PMID 31930374 result remains the public evidence source, so only local registry metadata was refreshed.

The randomized Parkinson disease dementia registry still has unknown status, a stale February 28, 2024 registry update, estimated December 2025 completion, and no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. The peer-reviewed PMID 40587145 result remains the public evidence source, so only local registry metadata was refreshed.

excluded_sources.title: Ambroxol as a Disease-modifying Treatment in GBA-PD
excluded_sources.reason: Completed phase 2 GBA-PD ambroxol trial with December 20, 2024 actual completion, last update posted August 14, 2025, and no posted registry results. It remains useful disease-program watch context but is not a same-window evidence delta.

excluded_sources.title: Ambroxol in New and Early DLB, A Phase IIa Multicentre Randomized Controlled Double Blind Clinical Trial
excluded_sources.reason: Recruiting dementia with Lewy bodies ambroxol trial, last updated May 5, 2026 with estimated September 15, 2027 completion and no results. It is adjacent no-results disease-program context.

excluded_sources.title: GRoningen Early-PD Ambroxol Treatment
excluded_sources.reason: Unknown-status early Parkinson disease ambroxol trial with July 2025 estimated completion and no posted registry results. It did not report an outcome update in this pass.

excluded_sources.title: Structure-Based Identification of Allosteric Glucocerebrosidase Stabilizers from Xylia xylocarpa (Roxb.) Taub. for Parkinson's Disease Using LC-MS Profiling and Computational Analysis.
excluded_sources.reason: Computational/phytochemical GCase stabilizer paper, not an ambroxol clinical result or human lysosomal-restoration outcome source.

excluded_sources.title: From Lysosomal Storage to Neurodegeneration: Sphingolipid Signaling as a Driver of CNS Pathology and Biomarker Strategy in Neuronopathic Gaucher Disease.
excluded_sources.reason: Review-level Gaucher/neurodegeneration biomarker context, not a primary result that changes the public Lysosomal Restoration read.

excluded_sources.title: Long-term inhibition of lysosomal glucocerebrosidase activity promotes GPX4 stability and inhibits ferroptosis in dopaminergic neurons.
excluded_sources.reason: Dopaminergic-neuron mechanism paper that complicates GCase biology but does not report human ambroxol, aging, functional, or safety outcomes.

excluded_sources.title: Lysine acetyltransferase 8-mediated histone acetylation, regulated by GBA1, is associated with lysosomal function related to alpha-Synuclein pathology.
excluded_sources.reason: GBA1/KAT8/alpha-synuclein mechanism context, not result-bearing human lysosomal-restoration evidence.

notes: This pass was selected manually after the global trial-watch audit still showed stale open records following stem-cell rejuvenation and Rapalogs cleanup.
The delta window is anchored to the 2026-06-07 Lysosomal Restoration surveillance session and the 2026-06-13 coverage assessment.
The local status for ASPro-PD was aligned from active to recruiting to match ClinicalTrials.gov. This is a metadata reconciliation, not evidence progress.
No coverage assessment update is needed because the June 13 coverage assessment already captured ASPro-PD and adjacent no-results ambroxol disease-program watch context.
next_actions: Continue ordinary surveillance for posted ASPro-PD, AMBITIOUS/GBA-PD, Lewy body dementia ambroxol, and other ambroxol disease-program results.

Create a public bundle only if future evidence changes stage, evidence weight, momentum, blockers, safety, durability, human target engagement, functional outcomes, or the lysosomal-restoration translation boundary.
